ot_description: Built the multi-select dropdown filter and the customizable DataTable header for the Users screen, wiring the filter state into the user-list query. Reviewed and tested the manager-role leave, attendance and shift-change request flows, kept the branch in sync with dev, and went through the team's recent commits across the app and backend.

tasks.name: Filter UI — Multi-Select Dropdown & DataTable Header
tasks.body: Filter UI with multi-select dropdown and DataTable header customization
tasks.summary:
- Implemented multi-select dropdown filter component for the Users screen
- Added DataTable header customization to support dynamic column visibility
- Wired filter state to the user list API query params
- Committed feat(users) on feat/filter-ui branch

tasks.name: Manager Role — Leave, Attendance & Shift Change Request Review, Debug & Test
tasks.body: Manager role: review leave, attendance, shift change requests + debug and test
tasks.summary:
- Reviewed leave request flow under manager role — verified visibility and approval actions
- Tested attendance request list and status filters for manager-scoped access
- Reviewed shift change request handling for managers
- Debugged and tested end-to-end manager role permissions and request flows

tasks.name: Branch Sync — Merge Dev into feat/filter-ui
tasks.body: Pulled latest dev and merged into feat/filter-ui
tasks.summary:
- Pulled latest changes from dev branch into feat/filter-ui
- Resolved merge conflicts and verified feature parity
- Kept branch up to date ahead of PR

tasks.name: Codebase Research & Commit Analysis
tasks.body: MIPL codebase research and team commit review
tasks.summary:
- Reviewed full commit history across monarch-innovation-app and monarch-innovation-backend
- Analysed today's team commits (67 total) across workflow, meals, attendance, and UI modules
- Investigated branch state, author breakdown, and PR merge status for planning

ot_pushed.summary: Built the multi-select dropdown filter and the customizable DataTable header for the Users screen, wiring the filter state into the user-list query. Reviewed and tested the manager-role leave, attendance and shift-change request flows, kept the branch in sync with dev, and went through the team's recent commits across the app and backend.
